sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94825" key="skiadi/skh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐᾰδίσκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <sense id="n94825.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σκιάδειον, πάϊς Κύκης . . ς. φορεῖ γυναιξὶν αὔτως</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:21:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
